allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5432,5433,5154,5173,80 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique)

PowerShell($nm = "c:\\Users\\yagup\\Desktop\\projectx\\frontend\\node_modules"; if \(Test-Path $nm\) { "node_modules exists"; foreach \($p in @\('react-leaflet','leaflet','qrcode'\)\) { if \(Test-Path "$nm\\$p"\) { "  - $p OK" } else { "  - $p MISSING" } } } else { "node_modules MISSING" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5154,5173,5174,80 } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on port $\($_.LocalPort\)" } catch {} } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5154/swagger/index.html" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Backend OK: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5154/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Backend OK \(root\): HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend not reachable yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; Write-Output "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Frontend OK: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend not reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5154,5173,5174,80 } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Start-Sleep 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5154,5173,5174,80 } | Select-Object LocalPort)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5154/" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "Backend 5154 OK: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend 5154 NOT YET: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Frontend 5173 OK: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend 5173 NOT YET: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Backend served frontend on 80 OK: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Port 80 NOT YET: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5154/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test","password":"test"}' -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) body=$\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\); body=$\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5173,5174 } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on $\($_.LocalPort\)" } catch {} })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"x","password":"x"}' -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Through vite proxy: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 5154 } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on 5154" } catch {} })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5154,5173,5174,80 } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on $\($_.LocalPort\)" } catch {} } | Sort-Object -Unique; Start-Sleep 1; "After cleanup:"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5154,5173,5174,80 } | Select-Object LocalPort)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5154/" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "Backend 5154: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Backend 5154: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Frontend 5173: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend 5173: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./src/i18n/locales/en.json'\); const ru = require\('./src/i18n/locales/ru.json'\); const az = require\('./src/i18n/locales/az.json'\); console.log\('Sidebar nav \(en/ru/az\):', en.nav.dashboard, '|', ru.nav.dashboard, '|', az.nav.dashboard\); console.log\('Login \(en/ru/az\):', en.auth.signIn, '|', ru.auth.signIn, '|', az.auth.signIn\); console.log\('Total top-level namespaces:', Object.keys\(en\).length, Object.keys\(ru\).length, Object.keys\(az\).length\);")
